programme.title: History'S Most Shocking
programme.desc: (M) Tony analyzes shocking moments: near-misses with trains, a vehicle losing wheels, an avalanche burying a snowmobiler, and the real plane crash from The Six Million Dollar Man.

programme.title: Biography: The Trump Dynasty
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: The Secret History Of The White House
programme.desc: (PG) Through investigative journalists and government insiders, explore the the secret constructions in the White House premises in order to heighten the security of its occupants.

programme.title: 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.sub-title: 2023 - 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
